summary: Iteration 72 - Mobile UI/UX and Admin User Management Testing. Tested mobile responsive CSS at 320px, 375px, 414px breakpoints. Verified Admin Users Management page at /app/admin/users. Tested admin reset credits API and create user API. QA user login verified with unlimited credits.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) after multiple rapid requests during testing
Had to manually fix QA user password via DB - admin create user endpoint was working but test had wrong password in DB

ui_bugs.issue: Login button appears small (40px) on mobile due to button CSS overrides. Works functionally but could be styled better.

issues: Console warning about tr/span/tbody nesting in React DevTools - cosmetic issue only

critical_code_review_comments: Mobile responsive CSS at index.css lines 600-1300 is comprehensive with breakpoints for 320px, 360px, 375px, 390px, 414px, 768px
Autofill color removal CSS properly targets Chrome/Safari/Firefox autofill states
Admin Users Management page properly loads and displays user list with stats cards
Reset Credits modal has preset buttons (100, 1K, 10K, Unlimited) - good UX
Create User modal has role selection (User, QA, Admin) - working correctly

success_rate.backend: 94% (16/17 tests passed - 1 error due to rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All mobile UI features verified working

seed_data_creation: Fixed QA user password in database to enable login with QATester@2026!
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin user management features working. QA user qa@creatorstudio.ai can login with unlimited credits. Mobile responsive CSS is comprehensive. Login button on mobile appears small but functions correctly.

tests: Stats cards (Total, Admin, QA, Regular users)
